name: Unusual Value Size in Windows Registry
notes: This rule triggers when a value with an unusual size is set in Windows Registry.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches STRLEN("Target Details") > 100 AQL filter query
when the event matches Target Details (custom) contains all of [ c:\windows\softwaredistribution\download\install\am_delta_patch_ or User: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM]
TD_list: APPLY Unusual Value Size in Windows Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches STRLEN("Target Details") > 100 AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Target Details (custom) contains all of [	c:\windows\softwaredistribution\download\install\am_delta_patch_ or User: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM]
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Long Value in Windows Registry
Event description: Detected a very Long Value in Windows Registry
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
